channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump repeats claims that Iran deal is only 'days' away, despite recent strikes
item.description: Speaking to reporters after attending the NBA Finals in New York, Trump said the two parties are in the final stages of a "very, very good deal".

item.title: Bitcoin's brutal sell-off sparks a flurry of trading in related stocks, including one big bullish bet
item.description: The year has been a rocky one for the flagship cryptocurrency, but traders aren't backing away from the space.

item.title: Nuvalent shares surge 39% after UK's GSK agrees to buy the cancer drugmaker for $10.6 billion
item.description: The deal comes at a time of biotech dealmaking frenzy, driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets and drugmakers' race to bolster pipelines.

item.title: USDA Secretary Rollins calls Texas ag chief 'unserious' amid screwworm threat
item.description: Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller lost his bid for a fourth term in a March Republican primary, despite Trump's endorsement.

item.title: Gold could slump another 20% by September, says Citi — here's why
item.description: Since the outbreak of the U.S.-Iran war on Feb. 28, gold's reputation as a "safe haven" asset in times of turmoil has come under pressure.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: GSK, Nuvalent, J.M. Smucker, SailPoint and more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.

item.title: The 'SaaSpocalypse' is over, says private equity giant Thomas Bravo. Here's why it sees an AI boom for software
item.description: Thoma Bravo founder Orlando Bravo says AI offers an "enormous tailwind" for software companies.

item.title: Apple partnering with Google and Nvidia for most advanced AI model
item.description: Apple's artificial intelligence strategy took center stage at its Worldwide Developers Conference in Cupertino, Calif.

item.title: Airlines find the grass isn't always greener with new engines
item.description: Airline CEOs complained that manufacturers aren't making enough of their engines and that they're falling short on reliability.

item.title: Stocks are recovering from a sell-off — but even bullish investors warn of a bumpy ride ahead
item.description: Stocks edged higher on Tuesday, marking a tentative recovery from a bout of volatility led by an aggressive sell-off of global technology shares.

item.title: Trump booed before Knicks lose to Spurs at Madison Square Garden in NBA Finals Game 3
item.description: Trump's decision to attend Game 3 of the NBA Final was controversial for Knicks fans, some of whom feared he would jinx what has been an epic playoff run.

item.title: 51% of U.S. adults say the American Dream is out of reach for most people right now: CNBC survey
item.description: In an exclusive CNBC survey, 81% of respondents said the cost of living is their biggest financial hurdle to achieving the American Dream.

item.title: Trump's trade war has a new target: forced labor. The case behind it is far from simple
item.description: Ending forced labor is a goal most countries around the world have but few actually have success, including the U.S. Can Trump's tariffs change that?

item.title: OpenAI confidentially files for IPO, prepping Wall Street for mega AI debut
item.description: OpenAI's confidential filing lands days before SpaceX is set to go public and a week after Anthropic announced its confidential disclosure with the SEC.

item.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang declines Senate testimony on AI, China and exports
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren said Nvidia’s CEO should answer questions publicly as lawmakers scrutinize AI chip sales to China and export controls.

item.title: India's growth story faces its toughest test yet in Modi’s third term
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi faces his biggest test as India's appeal as the world's fastest-growing economy dims for global investors.

item.title: The space race is coming for pharma: Why drug development is heading to lower Earth orbit
item.description: Companies see a commercial opportunity in creating new ways to administer drugs to patients – in space.

item.title: Shares of this cleantech stock could double on AI data center demand, says Canaccord Genuity
item.description: FuelCell energy fell on disappointing earnings, but a potential long-term data center play makes Canaccord Genuity think its time to get into the stock.

item.title: Pentagon expands list of China military-linked firms to include Alibaba, Baidu in fresh blow to diplomatic thaw
item.description: The Pentagon briefly posted a similar expanded list in February, then withdrew it without explanation before Trump's China trip.

item.title: Corning strikes another multibillion-dollar AI deal. What the new Amazon pact means for the stock
item.description: Amazon joins the laundry list of partnerships Corning has secured in 2026, which includes Meta Platforms and Nvidia.

item.title: Perplexity plans IPO in 2028 regardless of what happens to Anthropic or OpenAI, CEO tells CNBC
item.description: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas' comments come after AI giant Anthropic confidentially filed to go public.

item.title: Low income? You can still borrow for college. Here’s where to start
item.description: Low income? You can still borrow for college. We found ways to help bridge the gap between what college costs and what you can afford.

item.title: Jim Cramer warns key pillars of the bull market are beginning to crumble
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said that he's becoming more cautious on stocks after several pillars of his bullish outlook have come under pressure.

item.title: Judge blocks Trump's $100,000 H-1B visa fee
item.description: Trump had imposed the $100,000 fee in order to restrict the program, arguing that it has undermined U.S. security through the "replacement of American workers."

item.title: Convicted FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried files formal request for Trump pardon
item.description: The co-founder of the now defunct FTX crypto exchange is currently serving a 25-year federal prison sentence.

item.title: KBW upgrades Toll, citing the K-shaped housing market favoring the 'affluent'
item.description: The bank thinks Lennar and Toll brothers are heading in different directions due to the K-shaped economy.

item.title: Congress moves toward approving $70 billion for ICE and CBP through Trump's presidency
item.description: The U.S. House is expected to vote this week on a $70 billion measure to fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection after delay.

item.title: Trump nominates Todd Blanche for attorney general amid controversy over DOJ fund
item.description: Blanche previously served as a criminal defense lawyer for President Trump.

item.title: Electric vehicle giant BYD predicts 80% of China car sales will soon be electric
item.description: BYD expects China's competitive electric vehicle market to continue growing, even as manufacturers and analysts anticipate domestic demand to taper further.

item.title: China's May shipments to U.S. clock 5-year high growth at 35% as overall exports jump on tech boost
item.description: Exports to the U.S. surged the most since March 2021, extending a rebound following a long streak of double-digit declines for the most of last year.
